description: Composition Black full sleeves pullover with horizontal white stripes, made of 80% acrylic and 20% wool, has a V-neck, ribbed neckline, cuff and hem, with brand badge appliqued on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine/hand wash in cold water at 30 C with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print This black pullover from scullers is the perfect answer to those chilly days when you're left shivering in the cold. Warm, soft and incredibly stylish, it will not only ward off the cold, it will also add that touch of class to your outfits. Team it with your best denims or corduroys and get going. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
